title: CakeCannon DataPack
description: [​This DataPack Adds A Small Cannon That Shoots Cake, Shoot At The Ground Or Mobs And The Ground Or Mob Will Explode Into Cake]
body:
- **[​This DataPack Adds A Small Cannon That Shoots Cake, Shoot At The Ground Or Mobs And The Ground Or Mob Will Explode Into Cake]**

to use the cannon just right-click it and it will fire, and it takes a few seconds to reload you don't have to hold the cannon for it to reload.

This Was Simple To Make So Injoy Everyone :)

- Functions:
- cake_cannon:give/cannon
- cake_cannon:falling_block_summon
